description_long: This is a packaged Faragello XL Croissant, wrapped in a vibrant blue plastic wrapper. The front of the package features a large, appetizing image of a golden-brown croissant with a visible chocolate filling, alongside bold white and orange branding. The wrapper is rectangular and pillow-shaped, with sealed edges and nutritional information, barcode, and branding details printed on the back. The packaging appears airtight, designed to keep the croissant fresh and protected from external elements. The croissant inside is likely soft and flaky, with a rich chocolate center, as depicted on the front. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and suitable for display in urban convenience stores or vending machines.
description: A blue, pillow-shaped Faragello XL Croissant package featuring a chocolate-filled croissant image and bold branding. The wrapper is sealed and displays nutritional and product information.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Faragello branding, croissant image, and XL label prominently on a blue background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin, sealed edge of the package with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Back view displays nutritional facts, barcode, and product information in white text on a blue background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the sealed edge and partial branding.
